victim_side: FMLN insurgents in the capital offensive
formula_note: Converted 2,000-2,300 insurgents over a 32-day episode window (11 Nov-12 Dec inclusive) into person-months. Best uses the midpoint count of 2,150.
uncertainty_note: This is the strongest city-bounded combatant denominator recovered, but it has no matched city-bounded civilian or government-force denominator.
quality_note: Useful denominator fallback for the insurgent side only.
